_comment: Maps user-facing water availability options to numeric levels, and crop water_requirement_level strings to the same numeric scale. Scoring penalizes crops whose water need is far above the farmer's available water.

userOptions.label: Rainfed
userOptions.description: No irrigation, depends entirely on rainfall

userOptions.label: Flooded
userOptions.description: Continuous water supply or flooded conditions (paddy/sugarcane)

cropWaterRequirementLevels._comment: Maps crop water_requirement_level strings from cropDetails.json to numeric scale 1–5

scoringPenalty._comment: Penalty rules. If crop needs MORE water than available, penalize heavily. If crop needs LESS water than available, minor penalty (overwatering risk).
